items.headline: Zapier is bleeding you silently - 7+ Zaps down since yesterday
items.detail: Stripe cancellation sync to HubSpot is broken. Every cancelled sub since yesterday morning isn't updating in HubSpot. Your active member count is drifting. Likely a single expired HubSpot auth token causing cascading failures. 10 min fix in Zapier settings - reconnect HubSpot. This is the highest leverage 10 minutes of your day.

items.headline: 192 booked calls this month at $25.92 CPBC - but zero DC capacity to take them
items.detail: You're paying $5K/month to fill a calendar that's closed. Recovery email went to 1,895 leads - great. But until Tom is live or Anthony gets more slots, every new booking is a leak. The /start page deposit path is live - monitor how many $111 deposits come through vs traditional DC bookings this week. That ratio tells you if the direct path works.

items.headline: MRR dropped to $41.7K - down from $52K two weeks ago
items.detail: 60 collecting families vs 67 two weeks ago. 6 failed/past due subs ($1,058 at risk). With Zapier broken, some of these may be phantom - Stripe cancelled but HubSpot still showing active. Clean the Zapier connection first, then get a true count. The real number might be worse.

items.headline: Tom's first DC could happen Monday - if you call him today
items.detail: You decided on the part-time contract (~20hrs, 8 DCs/month MPS). Rye is in Perth. Tom can shadow Rye this week & take his first live call Monday March 30 when you open your 6-9pm slots. Every day you delay = another day Anthony carries the entire pipeline alone at 36%. One call to Tom today unlocks next week.

items.headline: Anthony's one-habit fix - confirmed across 5 transcripts
items.detail: Gold standard library analysis complete. The gap between Harry (81% close) & Anthony (36%) comes down to ONE pattern: when mum says something heavy, Anthony says 'Of course' & moves on. Harry asks one more question. Fixing this single habit could move Anthony from 36% to 50%+ - that's 4-5 extra closes per month at current volume. Rye's coaching email goes out at 4pm today with the specific drill.

leo_actions: Monitoring Sales Manager v2 scoring crons (12pm, 4pm, 10pm) - first full day of v2 pipeline
Pushing MC morning dashboard data refresh & tracking /start page deposit conversions
Preparing Rye's coaching-lens email for 4pm send (Anthony E-score drill + gold standard clips)
Building new lead → booked call % metric into mc-data-pipeline.py
